item.title: Father's Day Turns Into a Family Tragedy
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares a true crime story centered on a Father's Day event that changed a family's life.

media:content.media:title: Father's Day Turns Into a Family Tragedy
media:content.media:description: Brooke Makenna shares a true crime story centered on a Father's Day event that changed a family's life.

item.title: Saratoga Springs Case
item.description: An update on the Saratoga Springs, Utah case, where no arrests have been made. The video shares the latest publicly reported details.

item.title: A 10-year-old’s quick thinking in a true crime case
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares a true crime story about a 10-year-old whose quick thinking helped outsmart a family killer.

item.title: The Hoggle Case: Disappearance or Foul Play?
item.description: A look into the Hoggle case, examining theories surrounding the children’s disappearance, questions about possible underground adoption claims, and the ongoing investigation into what may have happened.

media:content.media:title: The Hoggle Case: Disappearance or Foul Play?
media:content.media:description: A look into the Hoggle case, examining theories surrounding the children’s disappearance, questions about possible underground adoption claims, and the ongoing investigation into what may have happened.

item.title: Who Killed Trish Haynes?
item.description: After Trish Haynes was found dead under suspicious circumstances, investigators focused on conflicting accounts, unanswered questions, and the people closest to the case as they searched for the truth.

item.title: A selfie helps reunite a family
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares a story about a selfie that helped lead to a family reunion after 17 years.
